query:
SELECT 
  JSON_KEYS(formData) as top_keys,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.receivesSnap') as receivesSnap,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.hasSnap') as hasSnap,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.receivesWic') as receivesWic,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.hasWic') as hasWic,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.livingSituation') as livingSituation,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.utilityShutoff') as utilityShutoff,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.receivesTanf') as receivesTanf,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.enrolledHealthHome') as enrolledHealthHome,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.needsWorkAssistance') as needsWorkAssistance,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.wantsSchoolTraining') as wantsSchoolTraining,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.transportationBarrier') as transportationBarrier,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.screening') as screening,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.screeningAnswers') as screeningAnswers,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.foodAllergies') as foodAllergies,
  JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.dietaryRestrictions') as dietaryRestrictions
FROM submissions 
WHERE id = 1980035 LIMIT 1;
